description: Correlate staff, calls, ASA, abandon, and survey scores weekly. Publish conclusions before metrics bite.

examples.context: ASA climbed two months. Answer survey slipped. Training blamed.
examples.resolution: Matrix showed ASA-abandon bundle. Staffing restored; answer score recovered.

examples.context: Finance proposed 4 FTE cut on support floor.
examples.resolution: Eight-week chain cited. Phased cut instead of cliff.

examples.context: Enterprise customer questioned support capacity claims.
examples.resolution: Ops correlation slide shipped. Renewal stayed on track.

examples.context: Print shop rush season. Callback volume up. CSAT wobble.
examples.resolution: Weekly row habit started. Rush staffing tied to abandon, not guilt.
